meta.title: How Video Games Really Can Make You A Better Fighter Pilot & Other Top Stories From Sandboxx News
meta.description:
It's Friday 19 February 2021.  Stay up to date on what's happening in the military with Sandboxx News. 

Here are this week's top stories from Sandboxx News: 

U.S. CONDUCTS MULTIDOMAIN EXERCISE CLOSE TO RUSSIA
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/2ZvZSgV

6 CRAZY NEW DOD PROGRAMS THAT SOUND LIKE SCIENCE FICTION
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/3pALsGP

HOW A MODERN BATTALION OF ARMY RANGERS WOULD PERFORM IN CIVIL WAR COMBAT
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/2NEjMno

AMERICA’S SECRET SUPERSONIC D-21 DRONES FLEW OVER CHINA IN THE 1960S
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/2NkHjK9

AIR FORCE SPECIAL OPERATIONS COMMAND IMPLEMENTS NEW PILOT INITIATIVE
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/2OXceNf

‘THE EXPANSE:’ POLITICS, MYSTERY, AND SCI-FI ACROSS THE UNIVERSE
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/2NlfIsg

HOW VIDEO GAMES REALLY CAN MAKE YOU A BETTER FIGHTER PILOT
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/2Zw2Php

*The appearance of DoD visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.
